message:
fix(fcp-webhook): include timestamp context in deterministic event IDs for deduplication accuracy

Add deterministic_event_id_with_context() that includes an optional
context string (e.g., request timestamp) in the SHA-256 hash, so
webhooks with identical bodies but different timestamps produce
distinct event IDs. This prevents false replay detection for
legitimate redeliveries with different timestamps.

Stripe: include timestamp_str in deterministic ID context. Parse
signature timestamp as string before conversion to avoid re-formatting.

Slack: include X-Slack-Request-Timestamp in deterministic ID context
so different-timestamp deliveries of the same payload are correctly
treated as distinct events.

Update test: pipeline_slack_missing_event_id now asserts distinct IDs
for different timestamps (was incorrectly asserting same ID and
expecting replay detection).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
